domain: B2B CRM for Industrial Kitchen Equipment
design_philosophy: Professional, trustworthy B2B aesthetic. Clean tables, generous spacing, clear hierarchy. Lightweight and modern but heavily corporate to suit daily-use by sales reps.

grid_system.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4 md:gap-6

sidebar.style: Fixed on the left, white background (surface), thin right border (border-slate-200).
sidebar.links: Padding y-2 x-3, rounded-lg. Active state gets bg-blue-50 and text-[#0073c4] with font-medium. Inactive state is text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900.

header.style: Sticky top, h-16, white background, border-b border-slate-200, flex items-center justify-between px-6.
header.elements: Breadcrumbs on left, User profile dropdown on right.

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden.
cards.header: px-6 py-4 border-b border-slate-100 flex justify-between items-center bg-slate-50/50

tables.style: Shadcn UI table style. w-full text-sm text-left.
tables.header: bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 font-medium uppercase text-xs tracking-wider
tables.pagination: flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-t border-slate-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#0073c4] hover:bg-[#005ba1] text-white font-medium shadow-sm transition-all rounded-lg px-4 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 font-medium shadow-sm transition-all rounded-lg px-4 py-2
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white font-medium shadow-sm transition-all rounded-lg px-4 py-2
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 font-medium transition-all rounded-lg px-4 py-2

forms.inputs: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 text-sm rounded-lg focus:ring-[#0073c4] focus:border-[#0073c4] block w-full p-2.5

badges.style: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

login_page.layout: Split screen or centered card. If split, left side is a sleek brand section with the industrial_kitchen_bg image and a dark #0073c4 tint overlay. Right side is a minimal white login form.
login_page.logo: Use the provided Arıgastro logo prominently.

dashboard.metrics: Status-based count widgets ONLY (Taslak, Gönderildi, Kabul, Red, Süresi doldu). NO REVENUE METRICS.

quote_preparation_form.layout: Two-column grid for customer details. Full-width dynamic table for products.
quote_preparation_form.product_search: Autocomplete search bar. Selected products appear as rows in the table.
quote_preparation_form.inline_editing: Product rows must have a small Phosphor pencil icon (<PencilSimple />) next to editable fields (Quantity, Unit Price, Discount %)
quote_preparation_form.totals_section: Sticky bottom or fixed bottom-right panel displaying Subtotal, VAT (KDV), Discount total, and Grand Total. Currency selector (TRY/EUR/USD).

pdf_template.layout: A4 proportion container, fully white background, highly structured and formal. Do not use UI-style rounded corners or heavy shadows here. Straight lines and classic typography.
pdf_template.header: Logo on left, 'TEKLİF' (Quotation) title and details (Quote #, Date, Validity) on right.
pdf_template.body: Clean bordered table. Columns: Image (optional), Product Code, Description, Qty, Unit Price, Total. Stripe every alternate row with very light gray (#f8fafc).
pdf_template.footer: Company Info (Arıgastro), Bank Details, Contact, Signature line.

icons.usage: Use thin or regular weights. Do not use duotone unless for empty state illustrations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Add 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' fonts from Google Fonts in your index.html or global css.
The primary corporate color is #0073c4. Configure it in tailwind.config.js as `primary`.

The application language MUST BE Turkish (TR). E.g., Dashboard -> 'Kontrol Paneli', Customers -> 'Müşteriler', Quotes -> 'Teklifler', Products -> 'Ürünler', Settings -> 'Ayarlar', Users -> 'Kullanıcılar'.
Build the dashboard metrics specifically for the counts of the 5 statuses (Taslak, Gönderildi, Kabul, Red, Süresi doldu). Omit any financial/revenue data.
The 'Quote Form' is critical. Use standard Shadcn Form primitives but ensure the product line items feel deeply integrated. Provide visual cues (pencil icon) for editable cells.
Implement the professional PDF template as a distinct view or printable component, completely stripped of web-UI elements like navigation and action buttons.
Always apply data-testid attributes to interactive elements, e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='create-quote-button'.
